title: App Love
original_title: สิ่งเล็กเล็กที่น่าร็อก
overview: A new Thai comedy which the story is about a man who dresses like a woman. One day, he falls in love with a beautiful woman that he meets at school in all of sudden. Their relationship becomes more interesting and many funny moments comes up as they become closer to each other.
